parameters.apprise_url_plus: humhubs://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own HumHub destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise humhubs:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub host

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub password

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub user
